systemConfig.title: System Configuration
systemConfig.description: Configure core system settings like timezone and debug mode.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: Affects log timestamps, scheduled tasks, and date displays throughout the application.

debug.label: Debug Mode
debug.enable: Enable verbose logging and detailed error messages
debug.warning: ⚠️ Requires application restart to take effect. Only enable for troubleshooting.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose between light and dark theme. Your preference is saved automatically.

units.label: Unit System
units.imperialDescription: Using imperial units: gallons, miles, MPG, °F, PSI, lbs, lb-ft
units.metricDescription: Using metric units: liters, kilometers, L/100km, °C, bar, kg, Nm
units.showBothDescription: Display values in both imperial and metric (e.g., "25 MPG (9.4 L/100km)")

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred display language. Community translations may be incomplete.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Choose your preferred currency for displaying costs and prices.
currency.confirmMessage: This changes how all costs are displayed. It does not convert existing values between currencies.

mobile.title: Mobile Experience
mobile.description: Customize how the app behaves on mobile devices.
mobile.quickEntryDescription: After signing in on a mobile device, go directly to Quick Entry instead of the dashboard

family.title: Family Management
family.description: Manage family members, user accounts, and dashboard visibility.

auth.title: Authentication Mode
auth.description: Configure how users access and authenticate with MyGarage.
auth.restartWarning: ⚠️ Requires application restart to take effect.
auth.noneDetectedDescription: MyGarage is running behind a reverse proxy authenticator. Authentication modes are only needed if you require additional access control beyond your existing setup.
auth.noneWarningDescription: Anyone with network access can view and modify data in MyGarage. Consider enabling Local Authentication or placing MyGarage behind an authenticator like Authelia or Authentik.
auth.localDescription: Local authentication allows users to log in with a username and password stored locally.
auth.oidcDescription: Configure single sign-on with your identity provider (Authentik, Keycloak, Auth0, Okta, etc.)

archive.title: Archived Vehicles
archive.description: View and manage vehicles you've archived (sold, totaled, gifted, etc.). Archived vehicles remain in analytics but can be hidden from the main list.

secretKey.label: Secret Key:
secretKey.description: Automatically generated and stored securely at {{path}}. No manual configuration needed. The key persists across application restarts.
